description: Letter from the lepers of Tiberias to Furayj b. Ḥasan. Dating: ca. 1030 CE. Asking for donations be given to the emissaries from Tiberias collecting charity on the senders' behalf.
tags: Tiberias lepers, Tiberias, Illness, communal, Appeal, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב בעברית מטבריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
